subcodes.first_line: From this Most Exalted Station and Most Glorious Horizon, this Wronged One maketh mention of the chosen ones of God, glorified be His majesty, that the sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در این مقام اعلی و افق ابهی اولیای حق جل جلاله را ذکر مینماید شاید حلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
